c24e7055d35feed7fe7f9e2ae4f8a5a0cc42db3d.prompt: In a Mauritian beach house, the master bedroom boasts warm white walls contrasting a dark wood headboard. A cane pendant light casts a soft, ambient glow, reminiscent of a tranquil coastal evening. The floor is polished concrete, blending seamlessly with the sandy beach outside, while a large, floor-to-ceiling window frames a breathtaking view of the Indian Ocean. The room is adorned with local textiles and artwork, creating a cozy yet resilient space that can withstand the coastal weather. Photorealistic interior design moodboard, late afternoon light.
